title: StepResult — single Flow step output
description: JSON Schema for the StepResult dataclass (src/body/flows/result.py:19). Wraps the result of a single step within a Flow — either an AtomicAction step (ref_id = action_id) or a nested Flow step (ref_id = flow_id). Produced by FlowExecutor and aggregated into FlowResult.steps. Authority: ADR-056 Wave 1 (flow-boundary contract); CORE-Flow.md §6. This file uses the .schema.json suffix and is intentionally skipped by intent_validator.py.

ref_id.description: The action_id (for AtomicAction steps) or flow_id (for nested Flow steps) that produced this result.

required.description: Whether failure of this step halts the parent Flow. Required steps gate subsequent steps; optional steps are best-effort.

ok.description: True if the step succeeded. For required steps, ok=False halts the Flow and sets FlowResult.ok=False.

data.description: The result data from the step — ActionResult.data for AtomicAction steps, or a summary dict for nested Flow steps.

duration_sec.description: Wall-clock duration of this step in seconds.

kind.description: Discriminates AtomicAction steps ('action') from nested Flow steps ('flow'). Mirrors StepKind enum for serialization.
